payment_terms_preference: Net 30 with milestone-based invoices (kickoff, midpoint, acceptance)
optioning: Provide two commercial options within the stated budget cap
must_have_deliverables: Rebuild ingestion for Shopify, Stripe, Postgres, Klaviyo with idempotent loads and retries
Refactor priority dbt models with tests and documentation
Implement orchestration with alerting and a documented runbook
Add data quality checks (freshness, volume, uniqueness, referential integrity)
Harden access patterns and secrets management; do not expand PCI scope
Cutover plan with rollback and minimal disruption to daily reporting
nice_to_have_deliverables: Near-real-time incremental ingestion for key order updates (sub-hour latency)
Lineage visualization for top priority models
Cost monitoring for Snowflake and connectors
success_criteria: 95%+ of daily pipelines complete by 7:30am ET
<1% freshness SLA breaches in 30 days post go-live
50% reduction in data incident tickets related to pipeline failures
Finance and merchandising reports require no manual patches for 30 consecutive days post go-live
constraints: Read-only access to production OLTP databases
Change windows Tues–Thurs 9:00am–5:00pm ET; avoid month-end close
Maintain PCI-DSS SAQ A posture; do not broaden PCI scope
Use existing Snowflake account; least-privilege roles and SSO

environment.orchestration_preference: Open to managed or open-source; avoid lock-in if possible

data_sources: Postgres OLTP (order events, SKU metadata, inventory)

security_and_compliance.pii: Names, emails, addresses present; GDPR/CCPA requests must be supported
security_and_compliance.pci: PCI-DSS SAQ A; tokenized via Stripe; no raw PAN processing
